arts.ttl: John Wenham thrilled as Tottenham seal transfer ahead of Man City
arts.sum: It’s not often that Tottenham can say they’ve outfoxed Man City, but that certainly appears to be the case with their capture of Luka Vuskovic. At just 17 years of age, the North Londoners are believed to have paid £12m for his services (Tottenham News), and that follows what’s now become standard practice for the […] The post John Wenham thrilled as Tottenham seal transfer ahead of Man City appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Sparta Prague – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Sparta Prague on Wednesday night as both teams look to extend their unbeaten starts in the Champions League. It will be the first time the two sides have met and the contest should be an intriguing one after strong starts for each in Europe. Nathan Ake could be included for the Citizens […] The post Manchester City vs Sparta Prague – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran: Arsenal target Aston Villa striker BETTER than Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Arsenal have taken steps to sign Jhon Duran from Aston Villa during the January transfer window, with the Colombia sensation outperforming even Erling Haaland in the early weeks of the Premier League season. Jhon Duran: Arsenal target striker BETTER than Haaland

arts.ttl: Man City vs Sparta Prague: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: After being held to a stalemate by Inter in a repeat of the 2023 final on Matchday 1, City cruised to all three points away at rookies Slovan Bratislava last time out with six games remaining. Manchester City take on Czech champions Sparta Prague on Matchday 3 of the Champions League league phase on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Sparta Prague – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Sparta Prague in the Champions League on Wednesday as the champions of England and the Czech Republic meet in Europe. The Citizens head into the clash unbeaten across all competitions so far this season and have taken four points from their two European fixtures. After being held to a goalless draw […] The post Manchester City vs Sparta Prague – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why Pep Guardiola’s father-son bond with John Stones is being tested to its limits
arts.sum: A golden nine-year relationship is being pushed by international duty and Manchester City’s range of defensive alternatives

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Sparta Prague
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's Cityzens were just about victorious at Wolves on Sunday thanks to John Stones' last-gasp winner and Wednesday's game does present the boss with a handy opportunity to rest and rotate after their weekend's travails. These two sides surprisingly enter the contest each with four points in the league phase table and Sparta will aim to offer City more of a game than Slovan Bratislava did before the October international break .
